description: You are an SEO Manager conducting a duplicate content audit for your company's website. Duplicate content caused by missing or incorrect canonical tags can lead to Google indexing the wrong URL and splitting ranking signals across multiple pages. Audit the canonical tag implementation for https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the complete canonical tag data, including page URLs and canonical URLs, as a CSV to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Write a duplicate content audit report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/canonical_report.txt that includes counts of pages with self-referencing canonical tags, pages canonicalized to different URLs, and pages with missing canonical tags, as well as any canonical chains or inconsistencies and prioritized recommendations. Login: user=ga, desktop GUI application.
